title: taraxacum angustum
intro: Taraxacum angustum, also known as the Narrow-leaved Dandelion or Western Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Taraxacum angustum include its potential to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. Taraxacum angustum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often consumed fresh in salads or used as a coffee substitute.
